positive: A minimalist, continuous line illustration of a majestic, stylized mountain range silhouette under a vibrant, watercolor-splashed gradient sky. Incorporate abstract, flowing forest elements and gentle mountain peaks forming a sense of journey and exploration. Use a limited palette of deep sapphire blues, sage greens, and warm terracotta accents against a creamy off-white background. The style should be clean, Nordic-inspired, and highly graphic, suitable for single-color printing on fabric. Central composition, perfect for a repeat pattern or a single focal chest print. High contrast, strong silhouette, flat color blocking, smooth vectors, symmetrical arrangement.
